error: The sandbox was not found: This error is likely due to sandbox timeout. You can modify the sandbox timeout by passing 'timeout' when starting the sandbox or calling '.set_timeout' on the sandbox with the desired timeout.

p2p_enrich.notes: Added 1 new pass_to_pass test from repo CI/CD: test_repo_check_deps (npm run check-deps after build). Discovered CI commands via package.json: build, eslint, tsc, check-deps, lint-packages, lint-tests. Tested commands in container - eslint OOM'd, tsc requires build first, check-deps works after build. Total p2p repo_tests: 3 (test_repo_build, test_repo_lint_packages, test_repo_check_deps)

validate.notes: Fixed solve.sh idempotency check - the grep pattern '|| 'Global'' was matching existing code in the file, causing false positive 'Patch already applied' detection. Changed to check for the specific pattern 'const currentWorkspace = clientInfo?.workspaceDir || 'Global'' which only exists after the patch. All 4 validation checks now pass: Docker build, NOP test (reward=0), Gold test (reward=1), Rubric judge (ICR=1.0).
